prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
The text of Item "13. Certain Relationships and Related Transactions, and Director Independence" ENDS somewhere on this page; the next section is "Item 14. Principal Accountant Fees and Services".
Find where Item 13 ends: right before the "Item 14" heading if that heading appears on this page, otherwise at the very bottom of the page.
Transcribe VERBATIM the 5 lines of Item 13 that come immediately BEFORE that ending point (its final lines). Give the running prose closest to the end — do NOT transcribe lines from the top or middle of the page, and do NOT transcribe a data table or figure; if the very end is a table, give the prose just before it. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Nasdaq listing standards require that a majority of our board of directors be independent. An “independent director” is defined generally as a person
other than an officer or employee of the company or its subsidiaries or any other individual having a relationship which in the opinion of the
company’s board of directors, would interfere with the director’s exercise of independent judgment in carrying out the responsibilities of a director.
Our board of directors has determined that Mr. Shuhaieng Zhang, Mr. Mingyue Cai and Mr. Yi Zhong are “independent directors” as defined in the
Nasdaq listing standards and applicable SEC rules. Our independent directors have regularly scheduled meetings at which only independent directors are
present.
